# TrailerDB — The Trailer Database

> TrailerDB is the largest open-source database of movie trailers on the web.

## Overview

TrailerDB catalogs every trailer for every movie, in every language. The database contains:

- 100,000+ movies with trailers
- 220,000+ YouTube trailer embeds
- Trailers in 30+ languages
- 9 trailer types: theatrical, teaser, TV spot, red band, IMAX, clip, featurette, behind the scenes, bloopers

## How to use this site

- Search for any movie by name to find all its trailers
- Browse movies by genre, year, or decade
- Filter trailers by type and language on each movie page
- All trailers are embedded YouTube videos

## Data

Movie metadata is sourced from TMDB (The Movie Database). Trailer video data comes from TMDB's video API, linking movies to their YouTube trailers. The database is updated regularly.

## API

Movie data is available as static JSON files:
- Movie detail: /data/movie/{imdb_id}.json
- Browse index: /data/index.json
- Site stats: /data/stats.json

## Open Source

TrailerDB is open source. The full database, collection pipeline, and website code are available on GitHub.
